subject: A humanoid figure launching into the air from a rocky cliff edge, trailing white magical energy, surrounded by storm clouds
description: A lone figure is depicted mid-leap, launching upward and outward from a jagged dark cliff edge into an overcast sky heavy with purple-gray clouds. A brilliant trail of white-gold magical energy streams behind them, leaving the cliff's surface and arcing into open air. The figure is small relative to the vast cloudy sky, emphasizing the audacity of the leap. The lighting is dramatic — the magical aura provides the primary luminance against the otherwise dim, stormy atmosphere. No weapon is visible; the pose is purely about propulsion and flight.
background: overcast stormy sky with purple-gray clouds
